name: Spoon River Electric Cooperative
territory: Fulton, Knox, Warren, and McDonough counties, west-central Illinois

netMetering.policy: Net metering at retail rate for systems ≤ 40 kW
netMetering.notes: Illinois Net Metering Act (220 ILCS 5/16-107.5) applies; west-central IL territory

interconnection.applicationFeeNotes: Residential ≤ 10 kW standard fee; larger systems require engineering review

incentives.notes: Illinois Shines (ABP) available; USDA REAP grants for agricultural members
